# credentials

A stored connection (keys + config) to one external trace source like Langfuse; the `sync` group runs the import that uses it. Dashboard: Settings -> Integrations.

**When to use:** Connect, inspect, rotate, delete, or health-check an external trace source. The schedule and import status live in `sync`.

> **Footgun:** Only `list` and `create` are workspace-scoped; `get` / `update` / `delete` / `run-health-check` take `credential_id` positionally and ignore `--workspace` and the saved default.

## Commands

| Command | Invocation | What it does |
|---|---|---|
| `create` | `bentolabs credentials create --data '<json>'` | connect a new source; runs the health check synchronously |
| `delete` | `bentolabs credentials delete <credential_id>` | disconnect a stored source |
| `get` | `bentolabs credentials get <credential_id>` | one credential: health status + redacted config |
| `list` | `bentolabs credentials list` | the workspace's connected sources |
| `run-health-check` | `bentolabs credentials run-health-check <credential_id>` | probe the source connection on demand; not a sync/pull trigger |
| `update` | `bentolabs credentials update <credential_id> --data '<json>'` | replace the full config (rotate keys); re-runs the health check |

Confirm exact arguments with `bentolabs credentials <command> --help`.
